title: stellaria borealis var. sitchana
intro: Stellaria borealis var. sitchana, also known as the Northern Starwort or Northern Stitchwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Stellaria borealis var. sitchana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin irritations.
